description: worker/nodes/arch/flux.py: Flux 2 Klein FP8 arch dispatch
context: Create worker/nodes/arch/flux.py: can_handle(model_obj)->bool, True iff arch=="flux". sample(model,conditioning,latent,steps,cfg,seed,device,cancel_flag,emit_progress)->(latent,int); per-step cancel_flag.is_set() + emit_progress. Mock: (MockLatent(),seed). Real: model=transformer cached by LoadModel via pipeline_cache. First sample() call per model_id assembles diffusers.Flux2KleinPipeline(transformer=model, vae=..., text_encoder=...) from cached components; cache assembled pipeline via pipeline_cache.get_or_load(f'{model_id}:pipeline',...), separate key from transformer. CRITICAL: use Flux2KleinPipeline, NOT FluxPipeline -- latter is diffusers' FLUX.1 class, incompatible with Flux 2 Klein weights; imports fine but silently loads wrong model. Inline comments: transformer float8, no upcast, when InferenceCaps.fp8=True, text_encoder/vae bf16; conditioning arrives pre-encoded (Qwen3). tests/test_arch_flux.py >=3 tests; can_handle False for ZiT model. ANVILML_WORKER_MOCK=1 pytest exits 0.

description: docs: Flux workflow JSON + PROOF_phase019.md smoke documentation
context: Create docs/example_workflows/flux_klein_fp8.json: same 8-node structure as zit_fp8.json with LoadModel/LoadVae/LoadClip(clip_type=qwen3)/ClipTextEncode/EmptyLatent/Sampler/VaeDecode/SaveImage; model_id placeholders for Flux 2 Klein 9B FP8, Qwen3 8B FP8-mixed, Flux VAE. Create docs/PROOF_phase019.md: manual real-hardware steps. ANVILML_WORKER_MOCK=1 worker/.venv/bin/python -m pytest worker/tests/test_parity.py exits 0 (unchanged 9 nodes).
